response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics matched the internally recognized song structures for 'Seiten Galaxy Cross' and 'Trio Dreams'.
2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were used as a layout, and vocal-to-audio matching was done manually to ensure precision.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were tightly wrapped around vocals. Short vocal bursts (e.g. 'Yeah! Yeah!', 'Trio Dreams!') were carefully separated to avoid trailing subtitle cards. We followed the rapid-fire timing rules to prevent cascading delays during fast lyric transitions.

subtitles.original: きらめき...
十字となって闇を暴く！
subtitles.english: Becoming a cross to expose the darkness!

subtitles.original: 駆け抜けた丘には...
subtitles.english: On the hill we ran through...

subtitles.original: 神様も知らない...
歴史が息づき...
誇る！
My tough and brave heart!
この絆、
星天ギャラクシィクロス！
逆光の翼で
Just believe!
焦がれる炎で
Big mission!
覚悟を背負い戦おう！
subtitles.english: Let's carry our resolve and fight!

subtitles.original: そして奇跡を待つものじゃなくて...
subtitles.english: And we are not those who just wait for miracles...

subtitles.original: その手で作るものと吠えろ！
subtitles.english: Howl that they are something we make with our own hands!

subtitles.original: 何分だって何分だって
subtitles.english: No matter how many times, no matter how many times,

subtitles.original: 立ち上がろうか？
聖なる全部の力で
subtitles.english: With all of our sacred power,

信じて照らせ！

Let's sing! Let's spin! Let's dance! Let's fun! Let's smile! Let's fly! Precure!

唇からこぼれる歌は...

subtitles.original: プリズム眩しい光反射、
三人寄れば文殊最高最強！
subtitles.english: three people together make the best, strongest wisdom!

subtitles.original: 始まるただ一つのライブ Enjoy together!
subtitles.english: The one and only live show begins, enjoy together!

subtitles.original: ハミング！
助走して！
カンバセーション コール&レスポンス！
輝くフレーズいいよね！

subtitles.original: 好きな好きなフレーズを、
シンフォニーに夢のせて君とあなたの元へ For you!
subtitles.english: carrying our dreams in a symphony to you and yours, for you!

subtitles.original: もっともっと輝きあえるね、みんなで！
subtitles.english: We can shine brighter and brighter together, everyone!

subtitles.original: One, two, three!
スクリーンにいつだって笑顔写しあおう！
subtitles.english: Let's always reflect our smiles on the screen!

subtitles.original: Show me!
君がいるからパワー生まれるよ今日も！
